content:
<USER_REQUEST>
# KAA ERP – Accounting Module Enhancement Based on Client P&L Structure

You are a Senior ERP Solution Architect working on KAA ERP.

## Context

KAA ERP is already live.

Live data currently exists only in:

* HRMS
* Employees
* Attendance
* Leave
* ESSP

Accounting currently contains no production transactions.

The client has provided an Excel workbook containing their accounting structure and reporting expectations.

This workbook must be used to enhance the Accounting module.

## Critical Requirement

DO NOT modify or disturb:

* HRMS tables
* Employee data
* Attendance data
* Leave data
* ESSP data
* Existing live workflows
* Existing RLS policies.

Accounting implementation must be isolated.

---

## Workbook Sheets Identified

### P and L

Used as Profit & Loss reporting structure.

Should become:

* Financial Statement Templates
* Reporting hierarchy.

---

### STOCK

Contains inventory categories.

Implement as:

Accounting Masters:

account_stock_categories

Examples:

* 3X Bobipreg & Consumables
* 3X Fillers & Primers
* 3X Reinforcekit 4D
* 3X Rollerkit

Link to:

Inventory Item Categories.

---

### Purchase Accounts

Implement as Ledger Masters.

Create:

account_purchase_ledgers

Examples:

* Purchase – 3X Bobipreg & Consumables
* Purchase – 3X Reinforcekit 4D
* Purchase – CH ARC Industrial Coatings

Link to:

* Inventory Purchases
* Vendor Bills
* Purchase Orders.

---

### Direct Expenses

Create master:

account_direct_expense_ledgers

Examples include:

* COS – Packaging
* COS – Projects
* Customs Duty & Legalization Charges
* Freight Charges
* Employee Benefit Related Costs

Requirements:

Allow cost center allocation.

Support Project Cost Centers.

Support Manpower Contract Cost Centers.

---

### Sales Accounts

Create master:

account_sales_ledgers

Examples:

* Manpower Contracts Income
* Projects Income
* Sales Discount / Rebate
* Trading – 3X Engineering Income
* Trading – Chesterton Income

Requirements:

Support:

* Cost Centers
* Projects
* Contracts
* Mixed stock + service sales.

---

### Indirect Incomes

Create master:

account_indirect_income_ledgers

Examples:

* Exchange Gain
* Interest Income
* Other Indirect Income.

---

## Masters Required

Implement Accounting Masters under Organisation → Accounting Masters.

Create:

* Chart of Accounts
* Account Groups
* Stock Categories
* Purchase Ledgers
* Sales Ledgers
* Direct Expense Ledgers
* Indirect Income Ledgers
* Cost Centers
* Project Cost Centers
* Contract Cost Centers
* Fiscal Years
* Accounting Periods
* Journals
* Taxes
* Payment Terms
* Currency Masters.

All masters must support CRUD.

---

## Cost Center Requirements

Support multiple dimensions:

### Project Cost Centers

Example:

PROJECT-001

PROJECT-002

---

### Manpower Contract Cost Centers

Example:

MANPOWER-QP

MANPOWER-RASGAS

---

Transactions must optionally allow:

* Project allocation
* Contract allocation.

---

## Database Requirements

Create isolated Accounting tables only.

Do NOT touch HRMS tables.

Use:

company_id

RLS

FK constraints.

Implement:

accounting_chart_of_accounts

accounting_account_groups

accounting_cost_centers

accounting_journals

accounting_journal_entries

accounting_journal_lines

accounting_purchase_ledgers

accounting_sales_ledgers

accounting_direct_expense_ledgers

accounting_indirect_income_ledgers

accounting_fiscal_years

accounting_periods.

---

## Profit & Loss Reporting

Use workbook P&L hierarchy.

Allow:

Revenue
→ Sales Accounts

Less:
Cost of Sales
→ Direct Expenses

Gross Profit

Add:
Indirect Income

Less:
Indirect Expenses

Net Profit.

Build as configurable templates.

---

## UI Requirements

Accounting Module:

Dashboard

Masters

Journal Entries

Vendor Bills

Customer Invoices

Cost Centers

Profit & Loss

Balance Sheet

Trial Balance

General Ledger

Reports.

---

## Reporting

Provide reports for:

General Ledger

Trial Balance

P&L

Cost Center P&L

Project P&L

Contract P&L

Purchase Ledger

Sales Ledger

Expense Analysis.

Reports must integrate with the existing KAA Report Builder.

---

## Implementation Rules

* Preserve all live HRMS data.
* No migration affecting employees.
* No changes to ESSP.
* No changes to Attendance.
* No changes to Leave.
* No deletion of existing accounting tables.
* Extend Accounting only.

Output Required:

1. Accounting schema additions.
2. Migration scripts.
3. Master creation plan.
4. Mapping of workbook lines to ledger masters.
5. UI implementation plan.
6. Validation checklist proving no HRMS impact.            ----------------------- Indirect Incomes

Exchange Gain
Interest Income
Other Indirect Income
Rental Income    --------------------------------------------------------
Do not miss anything... check everything in this message
</USER_REQUEST>
<ADDITIONAL_METADATA>

</ADDITIONAL_METADATA>
